title: c64cast configuration
description: Generated by `c64cast --print-schema`. Do not edit by hand — regenerate with `make schema`.

backend.description: Hardware backend family driving the C64.

transport.description: TR control link: USB serial or raw TCP (port 2112).

serial_port.description: Serial device for transport=serial (e.g. /dev/tty.usbmodem* or COM3). Required for serial.

baud.description: Serial baud rate (TR uses full USB bandwidth; 2 Mbaud 8N1).

host.description: TR IP address for transport=tcp (find via CCGMS "ATC" or RTC sync). Required for tcp.

storage.description: Where helper PRGs are uploaded + launched from.

url.description: Base URL of the Ultimate 64 (REST + DMA host).

system.description: Target video system timing (affects frame rate + SID PLAY rate).

dma_port.description: TCP port of the U64 Ultimate DMA Service (firmware default 64).

dma_password.description: U64 network password, if set. Prefer the C64CAST_DMA_PASSWORD env var over committing it here.

device.description: Webcam device index; -1 = system default camera (cv2 index 0).

use_reu_staged.description: REU bank-swap double-buffer for video push. "auto" (default) stages bitmap modes (hires/mhires) when the startup probe finds the U64's REU enabled, leaving char modes on the cheaper host-DMA path; true forces it on for every mode, false off. auto silently falls back to host-DMA when REU isn't confirmed.

enabled.description: Master switch for SID audio streaming (the 4-bit $D418 DAC). Also enabled by the -A CLI flag.

device.description: Audio input device index; -1 = system default microphone.

sample_rate.description: Audio sample rate in Hz fed to the SID DAC.

noise_gate.description: Mic level below which input is squelched to silence.

dither.description: TPDF dither on the 4-bit quantization step. Default off; flip on for smoother hiss on already-noisy sources.

digi_boost.description: EXPERIMENTAL: lock SID voices to a DC pulse so the ADSR D/As bias the master mixer, raising $D418 playback level.

sid_filter_cutoff.description: SID low-pass cutoff for the PWM carrier voice (0 = disabled). Attenuates the carrier above the audio band.

use_reu_pump.description: EXPERIMENTAL: stream video/mic audio from a REU ring (bus-clean) instead of per-write host DMA. Requires REU enabled.

reu_pump_governor.description: C64-side rate governor for the REU audio pump: the pump IRQ skips a chunk when its write head outruns the reader, stopping drift/echo with no host writes. Only active with use_reu_pump.

host_dma_servo.description: Closed-loop pacing for the host-DMA audio worker (mic / videos): reads the C64 NMI read pointer and adjusts the producer's software pace so the ring write head holds a fixed gap behind the reader, stopping the ~26s drift/echo. Pure host-side timing, no C64 writes. Not the REU pump path.

source_alignment_marker.description: DEBUG/CAPTURE ONLY: prepend a 100 ms chirp to REU audio as a capture-alignment anchor. Turn OFF for production listening.

pitch_mult_petscii.description: Host-DMA servo playback-rate multiplier for PETSCII mode (light char-mode load; 1.0 = none. U64-II NTSC: good at 1.0).

pitch_mult_hires.description: Host-DMA servo playback-rate multiplier for Hires / Hires-edges modes (REU-staged bitmap; bank-swap IRQ residual). U64-II NTSC ears-tuned to 1.02; override for TR+ or PAL.

pitch_mult_mhires.description: Host-DMA servo playback-rate multiplier for MultiHires mode (REU-staged bitmap + host-DMA $D800 color RAM). U64-II NTSC ears-tuned to 1.015; override for TR+ or PAL.

pitch_mult_mcm.description: Host-DMA servo playback-rate multiplier for MCM mode (char-based, light load; U64-II NTSC: good at 1.0).

pitch_mult_blank.description: Host-DMA servo playback-rate multiplier for Blank mode (no video input; 1.0 = none).

enabled.description: Enable webcam hand-gesture control (pinch=pause/resume, swipe=skip, open-hand=cycle). Needs the 'vision' extra.

model_path.description: Path to the MediaPipe HandLandmarker .task model bundle (download separately; see assets/models/README.md).

num_hands.description: Max hands the tracker detects per frame.

min_detection_confidence.description: Minimum confidence to detect a hand (0..1). Raise it if your torso/face occasionally register as a phantom hand.

min_tracking_confidence.description: Minimum confidence to keep tracking a hand across frames (0..1).

pinch_threshold.description: Thumb-index normalized distance below which a pinch registers.

swipe_velocity.description: Wrist horizontal speed (frame-widths/sec) that triggers a skip. HW-tuned: deliberate swipes peak ~0.5-1.1, drift stays < ~0.2.

gesture_cooldown_s.description: Minimum seconds between fired gesture events (debounce).

gesture_dwell_s.description: Seconds a pose (pinch / open hand) must be held STILL before it fires (0 = first frame). With the stillness gate this rejects busy/moving hands and poses passing through on the way to a swipe. Swipe (motion) ignores it.

hold_threshold_s.description: Seconds a pinch must be held while paused to resume.

mirror.description: Mirror the frame before tracking so swipe direction matches the mirrored webcam view.

interstitial.description: The 'UP NEXT' card shown between scenes.

duration_s.description: How long the 'UP NEXT' interstitial shows between scenes.

text_color.description: Interstitial text color: a C64 color name, 'rainbow', or 'random'.

background.description: Animated parallax background style behind the interstitial text.

videos_dir.description: Directory of videos to interleave between scenes.

interleave_videos.description: Insert a video from videos_dir after each scene (multi-scene playlists only; ignored in single-scene mode).

songlengths_file.description: Path to an HVSC Songlengths.md5 file; gives waveform scenes their true duration when duration_s is unset.

loop.description: Loop the playlist after the last scene (--no-loop exits after one pass; useful for 'play one video and quit').

heartbeat.description: Seconds between health heartbeat log lines (0 disables).

skip_probe.description: Skip the startup U64 reachability probe.

log_file.description: Also mirror log output to this file (useful for headless runs).

frame_numbers.description: Overlay the playback timecode + source frame number on video/slideshow/webcam frames (debug aid for locating flashing/flickering frames).

enabled.description: Open a local pygame window mirroring the U64 display (requires the 'preview' extra).

scale.description: Integer pixel scale factor for the preview window.

charset_path.description: C64 character ROM used to render char modes in the preview.

recording.description: Record the rendered display to a file.

enabled.description: Record the rendered display to a video file (cv2.VideoWriter).

scale.description: Integer pixel scale factor for the recording.

fourcc.description: FourCC codec code passed to cv2.VideoWriter.

color.description: Global pre-quantize color shaping for mcm/mhires/petscii: static channel boost + hue corrections, plus per-source adaptive auto_fit (video/slideshow).

channel_boost.description: Per-channel pre-quantize gain [blue, green, red] (OpenCV BGR order). Empty = built-in default [1.3, 1.2, 1.0] (blue/green lift toward C64-friendly hues; red left neutral).

hue_corrections.description: List of [[color.hue_corrections]] bands applied before quantize (keys: hue_lo_deg, hue_hi_deg, sat_thresh, val_thresh, sat_mult, val_mult, hue_target_deg, name). Empty = built-in purple rescue only.

hue_corrections_replace_defaults.description: If true, user hue_corrections REPLACE the built-in defaults instead of extending them.

auto_fit.description: Per-source adaptive color fit for video + slideshow scenes: pre-scan the source and stretch its contrast + saturation to fill the C64 gamut (faithful — hue preserved). Ignored by webcam scenes (can't pre-scan).

auto_fit_strength.description: Strength of the auto_fit transform, 0..1 (1 = full, 0 = off). Lerps the derived stretch toward identity.

force_palette.description: EXTREME forced-palette remap for video + slideshow scenes (mcm/mhires): pre-scan the source, k-means it into N clusters, and map each cluster to a DISTINCT C64 color so all N colors are used. Deliberate false-color (NOT faithful) — off by default; also reachable via the SHIFT cycle's 'percell+forced' stop once enabled.

force_palette_colors.description: Number of distinct C64 colors to spread the source across when force_palette is on (2..16). Ignored when force_palette_indices is set.

force_palette_indices.description: Explicit C64 palette index whitelist (0..15) for force_palette; its length sets the color count and overrides force_palette_colors. Empty = use all 16 (or the count).

dsp.description: Host-side audio DSP before the 4-bit DAC: compressor/limiter, expander (replaces the hard gate), pre-emphasis, and mic AGC.

enabled.description: Master switch for the host-side audio DSP chain (ON by default — the 4-bit DAC needs it). Set false for the legacy linear encode + hard mic gate.

pre_emphasis.description: High-frequency boost amount; y[n]=x+amt*(x-x[-1]). Brightens speech for intelligibility. Unset = source-aware default (mic 0.7 / line 0.6); a number forces that amount for all sources; 0 disables. Per-scene [[scenes]].pre_emphasis overrides this.

expander.description: Downward expander with hysteresis (replaces the hard noise gate when DSP is enabled). Attenuates below the threshold.

expander_threshold_db.description: Level below which the expander attenuates (dBFS).

expander_ratio.description: Expansion ratio (>1; larger = more attenuation below thresh).

expander_hysteresis_db.description: Gap (dB) below the open threshold before the gate closes — prevents chatter on signal hovering at the threshold.

expander_attack_ms.description: Expander gain open (attack) time constant in ms.

expander_release_ms.description: Expander gain close (release) time constant in ms.

compress.description: Soft-knee feed-forward compressor + makeup gain — the main win for fitting program dynamics into 4 bits.

comp_threshold_db.description: Compression threshold (dBFS); above this, gain reduces.

comp_knee_db.description: Soft-knee width in dB around the threshold (0 = hard knee).

comp_attack_ms.description: Compressor attack time constant in ms.

comp_release_ms.description: Compressor release time constant in ms.

comp_makeup_auto.description: Auto-compute makeup gain so threshold-level signal exits near unity. Set false to use comp_makeup_db explicitly.

comp_makeup_db.description: Explicit makeup gain (dB) when comp_makeup_auto is false.

limiter.description: Fast peak limiter / brickwall ceiling — final safety stage.

limiter_ceiling.description: Limiter output ceiling, linear 0..1 (just under full scale).

limiter_release_ms.description: Limiter gain recovery (release) time constant in ms.

agc.description: Automatic gain control for the MIC path only (line/video audio is already peak-normalized). Slow gain toward a target. EXPERIMENTAL: being level-based it can boost a sustained noise floor during long pauses — best on clean mics, or pair with the expander / raise agc_noise_floor_db above the floor.

agc_time_ms.description: AGC adaptation time constant in ms (larger = slower/steadier).

agc_noise_floor_db.description: Below this input RMS, AGC holds gain instead of amplifying the noise floor.

enabled.description: Run the HTTP control plane (pause/resume/skip/reload); requires the 'control' extra.

host.description: Bind address for the control-plane HTTP server.

port.description: Bind port for the control-plane HTTP server.

display.description: VIC-II display mode. waveform and midi are bitmap-only (both ignore this); slideshow also accepts 'random'.

name.description: Display name (shown in interstitials/logs; ensemble match key).

duration_s.description: Seconds before auto-advance. Unset = scene-type default. Video scenes reject this (they run until the file ends). For launcher this is the idle timeout (reset by player input).

target_fps.description: Per-scene frame-rate cap; unset = playlist default (60/50), except waveform scenes which default to half rate (30/25) to stay under the DMA ceiling.

audio.description: Per-scene audio override. Unset follows [audio].enabled; false mutes this scene only.

pre_emphasis.description: Per-scene HF pre-emphasis (0 = off, ~0.3-0.7 typical; brightens speech). Unset = global [dsp].pre_emphasis / source-aware default. Needs [dsp].enabled + scene audio.

palette_mode.description: VIC-II slot-allocation strategy for mcm/mhires display (ignored by other modes): percell (default), cheap, vivid, grayscale. Color shaping (channel boost + hue corrections, e.g. the purple rescue) is the global [color] section, applied to every mode.

style.description: PETSCII glyph/color style (only when display = 'petscii'); 'random' picks one at setup.

messages.description: List of message strings (or {text, color} tables) to scroll.

charset_path.description: C64 character ROM used to rasterize the big glyphs.

speed_cells_per_s.description: Scroll speed in character cells per second.

loop.description: Loop the message list forever (false = play once then advance).

target_fps.description: Override FPS used for px-per-frame snapping; unset = detect.

corner.description: Screen corner to anchor the text (top-left/top-right/bottom-left/bottom-right).

bg_color.description: Cell background color, or 'none' to leave the scene showing through.

corner.description: Screen corner to anchor the text (top-left/top-right/bottom-left/bottom-right).

format.description: strftime format for the time line (e.g. '%H:%M').

show_date.description: Also show a second line with the date.

date_format.description: strftime format for the date line when show_date is true.

bg_color.description: Cell background color, or 'none' to leave the scene showing through.

refresh_s.description: Seconds between value recomputes (the text is repainted every frame).

format.description: 'auto' for adaptive units, or a template using {d}{h}{m}{s}.

done_text.description: Text shown once the target has passed.

corner.description: Screen corner to anchor the text (top-left/top-right/bottom-left/bottom-right).

bg_color.description: Cell background color, or 'none' to leave the scene showing through.

refresh_s.description: Seconds between value recomputes (the text is repainted every frame).

file.description: Path to a .txt file of PETSCII art (one screen row per line).

corner.description: Corner to anchor the block (mutually exclusive with row/col).

row.description: Explicit top row (use with col instead of corner).

col.description: Explicit left column (use with row instead of corner).

bg_color.description: Background color, or 'none' to leave the scene showing through.

row.description: Screen row (0..24) the ticker scrolls along.

speed_cells_per_s.description: Scroll speed in character cells per second.

items.description: Which lines to show, any of: 'ip', 'hostname', 'ping'.

corner.description: Screen corner to anchor the text (top-left/top-right/bottom-left/bottom-right).

bg_color.description: Cell background color, or 'none' to leave the scene showing through.

refresh_s.description: Seconds between value recomputes (the text is repainted every frame).

password.description: OBS WebSocket password (if auth is enabled).

show_dropped.description: Append the dropped-frame count to the status line.

corner.description: Screen corner to anchor the text (top-left/top-right/bottom-left/bottom-right).

bg_color.description: Cell background color, or 'none' to leave the scene showing through.

refresh_s.description: Seconds between value recomputes (the text is repainted every frame).

row.description: Screen row (0..24) the ticker scrolls along.

max_items.description: Maximum number of headlines to include in the ticker.

speed_cells_per_s.description: Scroll speed in character cells per second.

messages.description: List of message strings to cycle through.

speed_cells_per_s.description: Scroll speed in character cells per second.

height_rows.description: Height of the bar strip in character rows.

gain.description: Multiplier applied to FFT magnitudes before bar height.

corner.description: Screen corner to anchor the text (top-left/top-right/bottom-left/bottom-right).

bg_color.description: Cell background color, or 'none' to leave the scene showing through.

orchestrate.description: Ensemble: make this system the conductor and broadcast this scene to all others (requires name; ignored single-system).

follower_only.description: Ensemble: exclude from normal rotation; used only as a broadcast follower override (requires name; excludes orchestrate).

file.description: Asset spec (comma-separated paths/dirs/globs). Videos for video, .sid for waveform, images for slideshow, .prg/.crt for launcher.

color_mode.description: Oscilloscope coloring: fixed per voice, or by current waveform type.

voice_colors.description: Per-voice trace colors (C64 color names) for color_mode=per_voice.

time_base.description: Scope time window: 'wallclock' (1 row = 1 frame) or 'auto' (per-voice window sized so auto_cycles cycles fit).

auto_cycles.description: Complete cycles per render window when time_base = 'auto'.

persistence.description: Trace decay/trail length ('off' redraws each frame).

scroll_columns.description: FIFO-scroll the strip left by N columns/frame (0 = redraw). Int or a list of 3 per-voice ints.

midi_port.description: MIDI input port name substring; unset = first available port.

midi_adsr.description: ADSR envelope as [attack, decay, sustain, release] (4 nibbles 0..15).

midi_pulse_width.description: SID pulse width (0..4095) when midi_waveform = 'pulse'. Swept live by CC1 (mod wheel).

midi_filter_cutoff.description: SID filter cutoff (0..2047); all voices are routed through the filter. Default open (neutral lowpass); swept live by CC74.

midi_filter_resonance.description: SID filter resonance (0..15) for MIDI notes; swept live by CC71.

midi_filter_mode.description: SID filter mode for MIDI notes.

midi_master_volume.description: SID master volume nibble (0..15) for MIDI notes; CC7.

image_duration_s.description: Per-image dwell time before advancing (total runtime is duration_s).

input_source.description: What counts as player input to reset the idle timeout: 'cia' (joystick bits at $DC00/$DC01), 'kernal' ($00C5/$00C6, only live while the kernal IRQ runs), 'auto' (both), or 'none' (pure timer, for demos). Never counts C=/SHIFT/CTRL.

max_duration_s.description: Hard ceiling in seconds — advance regardless of input. Unset = no cap (a continuously-played game runs forever).

min_duration_s.description: Floor in seconds before the idle timeout can advance the scene, even if no input is seen.

reset_before_launch.description: Reset the U64 before launching for a clean machine state.

bypass_audio_lock.description: Ensemble: don't contend for the exclusive audio slot — the launched program drives its own SID concurrently, so several people can play (and hear) their own games at once. No effect single-system.
